# cmake/CMakeLists.txt -- AUTO-GENERATED by `tur fetch`. Do not edit.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(SpiceDeps)

include(FetchContent)

option(TUR_FETCH_FORCE_FETCH "Bypass system find_package for :prefer-system deps" OFF)

# mbedtls
FetchContent_Declare(mbedtls
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
  GIT_TAG        v3.6.2
)
set(ENABLE_PROGRAMS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(ENABLE_TESTING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(USE_SHARED_MBEDTLS_LIBRARY OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(USE_STATIC_MBEDTLS_LIBRARY ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(mbedtls)
set(_mbedtls_resolved_via "fetch" CACHE INTERNAL "")

# yyjson
FetchContent_Declare(yyjson
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ibireme/yyjson
  GIT_TAG        0.10.0
)
set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(YYJSON_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(YYJSON_BUILD_FUZZER OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(yyjson)
set(_yyjson_resolved_via "fetch" CACHE INTERNAL "")

# --- Generate spice-deps-manifest.json ---
set(_spice_manifest_path "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/spice-deps-manifest.json")
set(_spice_manifest "{\n")
set(_spice_first TRUE)

# manifest entry: mbedtls
if(NOT _spice_first)
  string(APPEND _spice_manifest ",\n")
endif()
set(_spice_first FALSE)
FetchContent_GetProperties(mbedtls)
if(EXISTS "${mbedtls_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
  set(_spice_mbedtls_inc "${mbedtls_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
else()
  set(_spice_mbedtls_inc "${mbedtls_SOURCE_DIR}")
endif()
set(_spice_mbedtls_bld "${mbedtls_BINARY_DIR}")
string(APPEND _spice_manifest
  "  \"mbedtls\": {\n"
  "    \"resolved_via\": \"${_mbedtls_resolved_via}\",\n"
)
string(APPEND _spice_manifest
  "    \"include_dirs\": [\"$<JOIN:$<TARGET_PROPERTY:mbedtls,INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES>,\", \">\", \"$<JOIN:$<TARGET_PROPERTY:mbedx509,INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES>,\", \">\", \"$<JOIN:$<TARGET_PROPERTY:mbedcrypto,INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES>,\", \">\"],\n"
  "    \"link_dirs\":    [\"$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:mbedtls>\", \"$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:mbedx509>\", \"$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:mbedcrypto>\"],\n"
  "    \"link_libs\":    [\"mbedtls\", \"mbedx509\", \"mbedcrypto\"]\n"
)
string(APPEND _spice_manifest "  }")

# manifest entry: yyjson
if(NOT _spice_first)
  string(APPEND _spice_manifest ",\n")
endif()
set(_spice_first FALSE)
FetchContent_GetProperties(yyjson)
if(EXISTS "${yyjson_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
  set(_spice_yyjson_inc "${yyjson_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
else()
  set(_spice_yyjson_inc "${yyjson_SOURCE_DIR}")
endif()
set(_spice_yyjson_bld "${yyjson_BINARY_DIR}")
string(APPEND _spice_manifest
  "  \"yyjson\": {\n"
  "    \"resolved_via\": \"${_yyjson_resolved_via}\",\n"
)
string(APPEND _spice_manifest
  "    \"include_dirs\": [\"$<JOIN:$<TARGET_PROPERTY:yyjson,INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES>,\", \">\"],\n"
  "    \"link_dirs\":    [\"$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:yyjson>\"],\n"
  "    \"link_libs\":    [\"yyjson\"]\n"
)
string(APPEND _spice_manifest "  }")

string(APPEND _spice_manifest "\n}\n")
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${_spice_manifest_path}" CONTENT "${_spice_manifest}")
message(STATUS "spice: will write cmake/spice-deps-manifest.json at generate time")
